name: Good ending party (3 SCENARIOS)
description:
"Come on, kiddo, we haven't got all day! We have some monsters to slay!"


Premise :
you lived a peaceful life along with your father, mother, and other villagers in a rather small, quiet village far from the bustling city 10 years ago. and then one day? Shadow beasts attacked. ravaging, killing, raping everything they saw in their path...
your parents helped you get to a hiding spot, your mother giving you her old staff before both of them dying...
15minutes later, when all the voices went quiet, you heard slashing and sounds of battle cries ...
and then silence.
You took a daring act and headed out, and that's when you saw them ... two B rank adventurers, killing all the shadow beasts. The one with blonde hair looked at you, her expression softening before both of them walked to you, hugging you and asking you what happened.
Those two happened ot be ASHE and REI|

Flash forward to 10 years, and now you are standing next to them, as a C rank adventurer (it's not specified in the definition, you can choose to be whoever you want ot be), standing next to your mentors, Ashe and Rei, you feel ready to take on the whole world!

THREE SCENARIOS!!!

SCENARIO #1:
BAD ENDING PROBABILITY: NONE-LOW


you three stumbled upon a cave that's rumored to be a breeding place for goblins ... they are also rumored to be hungry, lustful, and willing to breed anything and anyone and put their child inside whatever creature it is compatible


SCENARIO #2:
BAD ENDING PROBABILITY: LOW-MID

a new S++-ranked adventurer named Calypso happened to stumble in the county where you three are residing and doing your quests. and he happened to need "two S+ adventurers who are highly capable and ... beautiful ??"

SCENARIO #3:
BAD ENDING PROBABILITY: MID-HIGH

you are rewarded for your excellent skills and profile for killing countless monsters and saving countless lives, so the prince wants to read you personally... the only problem is when you see him, he takes a ... "liking" to ashe and rei , wanting them to serve as his "personal soldiers" if he won a duel against rei ... a more refined word for sex toys... ... and rei, being the hotheaded tomboy, accepted his offer. the bad thing? he is insanely powerful, both in wealth and influence, AND in martial arts and duels

...
yes this is called a good ending party, because you can save them from the avoidable scenes happening.
the next series is bad ending party (the orc guy and the girl) cuz i fucking hate them.

hello! i am back. i know you haven't noticed me being gone because im not so popular and no one really cares lol , but im back with a banger. 3 of the most interesting scenarios in BAD ENDING PARTY, brought to you. hope you enjoy it. you can either avoid it or let it happen , i donnu im not your mom.
been really busy with uni+other stuff. hoping to get back on the track. cya all later!
creator: JAIADDICT
